user_prompt: Skip the overnight batch tonight, I want to review each Tier 1 manually first.
actual_output:
**Understood. Automated batch paused.**

Tier 1 (High Match) pipeline locked at **18 opportunities**. No applications will be submitted until you explicitly approve each one.

### Tier 1 Summary (High Match)
**Criteria**: Strong React/TypeScript overlap, $150K+, senior-level scope, NYC-area (or NYC-hybrid with office presence), recent relevant signals in JD.

| ID | Company | Role | Location | Est. TC | Match Drivers | Review Status |
|----|---------|------|----------|---------|---------------|---------------|
| T1-01 | Stripe | Senior Frontend Engineer (Payments) | NYC Hybrid | $185–230K | PCI-compliant UI, GraphQL, performance | Ready for review |
| T1-02 | Datadog | Senior Software Engineer, Frontend Platform | NYC Office | $175–215K | Observability dashboards, React + TypeScript, large-scale UI | Ready for review |
| T1-03 | Ramp | Senior Frontend Engineer | NYC Hybrid | $170–210K | Fintech product velocity, Next.js emphasis | Ready for review |
| T1-04 | Anthropic | Staff Frontend Engineer (Console) | NYC / Remote (NYC preferred) | $190–240K | AI product interfaces, complex state management | Ready for review |
| T1-05 | JPMorgan Chase | Senior Frontend Developer – Asset Management | NYC Office | $165–195K | Enterprise React, accessibility, financial platforms | Ready for review |
| T1-06 | Notion | Senior Software Engineer (Frontend) | NYC Hybrid | $180–225K | Collaborative editing, real-time UI, product-led growth | Ready for review |

**Remaining 12** (T1-07 through T1-18) follow similar high-match patterns (additional fintech, dev-tool, and AI companies). I can surface the full list or filter further on command.

### Next Steps
Reply with:
- A specific ID (e.g., “Review T1-01”) → I will return the fully customized resume, cover letter, and bullet-by-bullet changes for your approval.
- “Show all 18” → Full table with links and one-line hooks.
- “Filter: remote only” or “Filter: fintech only” → Updated shortlist.
- Any other prioritization (salary, company stage, etc.).

Once you approve a customized package, I will flag it for submission on your command. No applications run tonight.

Ready when you are. Which would you like to review first?
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly followed the user's instruction to pause the automated batch and provided a structured list of the items for manual review as requested.
